title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries for pulling and running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, generate, embed, pull, and list operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno and browsers; same API surface as the Python library.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration that exposes Ollama models as standard LangChain LLM and chat objects.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and user management.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Terminal UI (TUI) for interactive chatting, model management and logs, written in Go.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat pane.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation stack using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin for generating code, docs, and commit messages with any Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes for CodeLlama, Zephyr, SQLCoder, and fine-tuned LoRA adapters.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds “Ask Ollama” command to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, or rewrite text.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app with REST endpoints and async tasks (Celery) for chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit template that demonstrates chat UI, model selection, and token-throughput metrics.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate providing typed bindings to the Ollama REST API using reqwest and serde.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local LLM power to any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Bolt JS that answers questions via Ollama and shows model latency.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI built with Qt6 and Python for chatting and managing Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-microsoft-bot-framework
summary: Official sample showing how to plug Ollama into Microsoft Bot Framework for Teams and web chat channels.
